title: ListVersionsRequestPayload
description: Request payload for listing xRegistry Versions, optionally filtered by Group type, Group, Resource type, Resource, and/or label.

groupType.description: Group type. If not specified, Versions are listed across all Group types; in that case groupId must be specified explicitly or allGroups must be true, because the default Group only exists within a specific Group type.

groupId.description: Group identifier. Ignored if allGroups is true. If not specified, the default Group of the specified groupType is used; this default is only valid when groupType is specified, so groupId must be provided when groupType is not.

allGroups.description: If true, lists Versions across all Groups (groupId is ignored). If false, lists within the Group specified by groupId, or — only when groupType is specified — the default Group of that type if groupId is unspecified.

resourceType.description: Resource type. If specified, only Versions of Resources of this type are listed; when listing across all Groups, Resources of this type are matched across all Groups. Lists Versions across all Resource types if not specified.

resourceId.description: Resource identifier. If specified, only Versions of the Resource with this identifier are listed; when resourceType is not specified, this identifier is matched across all Resource types. Lists Versions across all Resources if not specified.

label.description: If specified, only Versions with this label are listed.
